name: marco-a-martinez
html:
marco-a-martinez
// jacking in...
css: .cp-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #0a0010; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; } .cp-scanlines { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 2px, rgba(0,255,200,0.03) 2px, rgba(0,255,200,0.03) 4px); pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; } .cp-wrap::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(180,0,255,0.18) 0%, rgba(0,255,200,0.08) 60%, transparent 100%); z-index: 0; } .cp-glitch { position: relative; z-index: 2; font-size: clamp(0.7rem, 4vw, 1.4rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #00ffe0; text-shadow: 0 0 8px #00ffe0, 0 0 20px #00ffe0, 0 0 40px #b400ff, 2px 0 #ff003c, -2px 0 #b400ff; animation: cp-flicker 3s infinite; } .cp-glitch::before, .cp-glitch::after { content: attr(data-text); position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; } .cp-glitch::before { color: #ff003c; text-shadow: 2px 0 #ff003c; clip-path: polygon(0 20%, 100% 20%, 100% 40%, 0 40%); animation: cp-shift-r 2.5s infinite; opacity: 0.8; } .cp-glitch::after { color: #b400ff; text-shadow: -2px 0 #b400ff; clip-path: polygon(0 60%, 100% 60%, 100% 80%, 0 80%); animation: cp-shift-l 2s infinite; opacity: 0.8; } .cp-sub { position: relative; z-index: 2; margin-top: 0.6em; font-size: clamp(0.4rem, 2vw, 0.65rem); color: #b400ff; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-shadow: 0 0 6px #b400ff; animation: cp-blink 1.2s step-start infinite; } @keyframes cp-flicker { 0%,100% { opacity:1; } 92% { opacity:1; } 93% { opacity:0.4; } 94% { opacity:1; } 96% { opacity:0.6; } 97% { opacity:1; } } @keyframes cp-shift-r { 0%,100% { transform: translateX(0); } 20% { transform: translateX(3px); } 40% { transform: translateX(-2px); } 60% { transform: translateX(0); } } @keyframes cp-shift-l { 0%,100% { transform: translateX(0); } 25% { transform: translateX(-3px); } 55% { transform: translateX(2px); } 75% { transform: translateX(0); } } @keyframes cp-blink { 0%,100% { opacity:1; } 50% { opacity:0; } }
